homeOverview.what: Mohtaoua is a marketing agency specialized in lead acquisition for training centers in Morocco.
homeOverview.who: Training center directors, education marketing managers, and leaders of professional training organizations.
benefits: More qualified requests for your sessions
Meta, Google, and TikTok campaigns driven by data
Full funnel: ads, landing pages, CRM, and automation
takeaways: 100% specialization in the training sector in Morocco

trust.experience: Over 150 campaigns run for training centers and educational organizations in Morocco.
trust.methodology: Audit → strategy → launch → continuous optimization with transparent reporting.

meta-ads.metaDescription: Facebook & Instagram campaigns to generate qualified leads for your training programs in Morocco: targeting, creatives, tracking, and optimization.

overview.what: Paid acquisition service on Meta (Facebook & Instagram) to fill your training sessions.
overview.who: Training centers that want to generate leads quickly with a controlled media budget.
benefits: Precise targeting by intent and profile
takeaways: Meta remains the #1 channel for training lead generation in Morocco

meta-ads.problem: Your center invests in advertising but gets poorly qualified leads, an unstable cost per lead, or campaigns that don't convert into enrollments.
meta-ads.solution: We build structured Meta campaigns by objective (lead, traffic, conversion) with custom audiences, training-sector creatives, and reliable conversion tracking.
howItWorks: Audit of your offer and funnel
Media strategy and creative testing plan

faqs.question: How much Meta budget does a training center need?
faqs.answer: We generally recommend 8,000 to 25,000 MAD/month depending on competition and seasonality. We calibrate the budget after the free audit.

faqs.question: How long until we get the first leads?
faqs.answer: The first requests often arrive between 7 and 14 days after launch, while the algorithm learns and we optimize audiences.

faqs.question: Do you handle visual and video creation?
faqs.answer: Yes, our Performance and Premium packages include creative production (static, carousels, Reels) tailored to your sector.

faqs.question: How do you measure Meta lead quality?
faqs.answer: We track cost per lead, contact rate, CRM qualification, and enrollment conversion rate when your CRM is connected.

faqs.question: Can you retarget visitors who didn't convert?
faqs.answer: Yes, through retargeting campaigns for site visitors, video engagers, and unconverted leads.

faqs.question: Do you work with the Conversions API (CAPI)?
faqs.answer: Yes, we set up the pixel and CAPI to improve tracking and performance stability post-iOS14.

faqs.question: What's the difference between Meta Ads and Google Ads for training?
faqs.answer: Meta generates demand (interruption marketing); Google captures existing search intent. Both are complementary.

faqs.question: Is there a minimum commitment?
faqs.answer: We recommend 3 months to reach stable performance, then a cancellable contract with 30 days' notice.

google-ads.metaDescription: Search, Performance Max, and YouTube Ads to capture future learners when they search for training in Morocco.

overview.what: Google Ads service (Search, PMax, YouTube) to capture high-intent demand for your training programs.
overview.who: Training centers with in-demand offerings (languages, IT, healthcare, management) seeking high ROAS.
takeaways: Google Ads excels on existing demand

google-ads.problem: Your competitors appear first on Google when a prospect searches for training, and your budget is wasted on overly broad keywords.
google-ads.solution: We structure conversion-focused Search and PMax campaigns with precise semantic targeting, optimized ads, and dedicated landing pages.

faqs.question: Search or Performance Max for a training center?
faqs.answer: Search for semantic control; PMax to expand on Display, YouTube, and Discover. We often combine both depending on budget.

faqs.question: What is a realistic Google Ads budget in Morocco?
faqs.answer: From 6,000 MAD/month to test a market; 15,000+ MAD/month to scale across multiple training programs.

faqs.question: How do you avoid unqualified clicks?
faqs.answer: Through negative keywords, precise geographic targeting, explicit ads, and landing pages aligned with intent.

faqs.question: Do you track calls generated by Google?
faqs.answer: Yes, with call conversion tracking, forms, and CRM events when the infrastructure allows.

faqs.question: Do you need one page per training program?
faqs.answer: Ideally yes: one landing page per offering improves Quality Score and conversion rate.

faqs.question: How long to optimize ROAS?
faqs.answer: First optimizations are visible within 30 days; stabilization happens over 60-90 days.

faqs.question: Can you manage YouTube Ads?
faqs.answer: Yes, for awareness and video retargeting, especially via PMax and dedicated YouTube campaigns.

faqs.question: Is the media budget included?
faqs.answer: No, the budget is paid directly to Google. Our fees cover strategy, management, and optimization.

marketing-automation.metaDescription: Email, SMS, and WhatsApp scenarios to convert your training leads into enrollments with nurturing and automated scoring.

overview.what: Multichannel nurturing automation to turn leads into enrolled students.
overview.who: Centers with sufficient lead volume but a low post-inquiry conversion rate.
takeaways: A connected CRM is a prerequisite

marketing-automation.problem: Your leads go cold due to lack of fast, structured follow-up, and your sales team wastes time on repetitive tasks.
marketing-automation.solution: We design automation scenarios connected to your CRM to qualify, follow up, and convert automatically based on prospect behavior.

faqs.question: What automation tools do you use?
faqs.answer: HubSpot, ActiveCampaign, Brevo, Make/Zapier depending on your existing stack and budget.

faqs.question: Does automation replace the sales team?
faqs.answer: No, it qualifies and warms up leads so your salespeople focus on hot prospects.

faqs.question: Can WhatsApp be automated?
faqs.answer: Yes, with structured follow-ups and appointment booking scenarios depending on your tool.

faqs.question: How many sequences are needed?
faqs.answer: Generally 3 to 5 sequences depending on sales cycle length (short vs. long training programs).

faqs.question: How do you measure automation ROI?
faqs.answer: Through lead → appointment → enrollment conversion rate and reduced processing time.

faqs.question: Do you need a CRM before starting?
faqs.answer: Recommended. We can also implement a lightweight CRM if you don't have one.

faqs.question: Does automation work in Arabic and French?
faqs.answer: Yes, we create multilingual journeys tailored to your audience.

faqs.question: What is the setup timeline?
faqs.answer: 2 to 4 weeks depending on scenario complexity and integrations.

landing-pages.metaDescription: Fast, optimized landing pages to convert advertising traffic into information requests for your training programs.

overview.what: Conversion-focused landing page design and optimization for your ad campaigns.
overview.who: Centers sending paid traffic to generic, underperforming pages.
takeaways: A good landing page can cut CPL in half
One message = one offer = one page

landing-pages.problem: Your advertising traffic lands on a slow or generic page that doesn't convert, increasing your cost per lead.
landing-pages.solution: We create dedicated landing pages per training program with conversion-focused copywriting, mobile-first design, and A/B testing.

faqs.question: How many landing pages are needed?
faqs.answer: At minimum one per main offering; ideally one per campaign or audience segment.

faqs.question: Do you use WordPress or Next.js?
faqs.answer: We prefer Next.js for speed, SEO, and integration with your existing site.

faqs.question: What conversion rate should we aim for?
faqs.answer: Between 8% and 25% depending on sector, price, and traffic quality.

faqs.question: Do you run A/B tests?
faqs.answer: Yes, on headlines, CTAs, forms, and social proof to continuously improve conversion rate.

faqs.question: Are pages SEO optimized?
faqs.answer: Yes: tags, semantic structure, performance, and structured data when relevant.

faqs.question: Do you integrate WhatsApp and scheduling?
faqs.answer: Yes, WhatsApp buttons, Calendly/HubSpot appointment booking, and multi-step forms.

faqs.question: What is the delivery timeline?
faqs.answer: 5 to 10 business days per landing page depending on complexity.

faqs.question: Can I edit the content myself?
faqs.answer: We deliver a clear structure; edits can be handled through our team or a CMS depending on the setup.

social-media.metaDescription: Editorial strategy, Reels, and community management to strengthen your training center's brand awareness in Morocco.

overview.what: Strategic social media management to build a strong educational brand and fuel acquisition.
overview.who: Centers that want a consistent presence and content that generates engagement and leads.

social-media.problem: Your social presence is irregular, unengaging, and doesn't support your advertising campaigns.
social-media.solution: We define an editorial line, produce Reels and carousels, and manage your community with monthly reporting.

faqs.question: Which social networks do you manage?
faqs.answer: Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and TikTok depending on your target audience.

faqs.question: Do you produce Reels on-site?
faqs.answer: Yes, on-site filming or remote depending on the chosen package.

faqs.question: How many posts per week?
faqs.answer: From 3 to 7 depending on the package: posts, stories, and Reels.

faqs.question: Does social media generate leads?
faqs.answer: Indirectly through awareness, social proof, and retargeting; we link social and ads.

faqs.question: Do you write in Arabic and French?
faqs.answer: Yes, bilingual or trilingual content depending on your market.

faqs.question: Do you manage comments and messages?
faqs.answer: Yes, with community management and a defined response SLA.

faqs.question: Do you provide reporting?
faqs.answer: Monthly report: reach, engagement, growth, top content.

faqs.question: Can social and Meta Ads be combined?
faqs.answer: Absolutely — it's our recommended approach to maximize ROAS.

crm-data.metaDescription: CRM implementation, dashboards, and attribution to manage your training center's acquisition with reliable data.

overview.what: CRM setup and optimization with dashboards to manage training acquisition.
overview.who: Centers losing leads due to lack of a centralized tool or unsure which channel performs.
takeaways: Without a CRM, optimizing real CPL is impossible

crm-data.problem: Your leads are scattered (Excel, WhatsApp, email) and you don't know which channel or campaign actually generates enrollments.
crm-data.solution: We implement a suitable CRM, connect your lead sources, and create real-time dashboards to manage acquisition.

faqs.question: Which CRMs do you recommend?
faqs.answer: HubSpot for the full ecosystem; Pipedrive for sales simplicity; Salesforce for large groups.

faqs.question: Can you migrate our existing data?
faqs.answer: Yes, import from Excel, Google Sheets, or a legacy CRM.

faqs.question: Do you connect Meta and Google to the CRM?
faqs.answer: Yes, via native integrations, Zapier/Make, or API depending on the setup.

faqs.question: Which KPIs should we track for training?
faqs.answer: Leads, CPL, contact rate, appointments, enrollment rate, CAC, and ROAS per program.

faqs.question: Do you create custom dashboards?
faqs.answer: Yes, real-time dashboards (Looker Studio, HubSpot, Notion) based on your needs.

faqs.question: Do you train our teams?
faqs.answer: Yes, onboarding session and documentation included.

faqs.question: What is the implementation timeline?
faqs.answer: 2 to 6 weeks depending on complexity and number of integrations.

faqs.question: Is the CRM included in your packages?
faqs.answer: Basic implementation is included in the Premium package; CRM licenses are at your expense.
